message:
test(proptest): add 27 property tests for input_latency module (ft-1memj.25)

Covers serde roundtrips for all 9 serializable types (InputLatencyStage,
Percentile, InputLatencyMeasurement, StageBudget, InputLatencyBudget,
BudgetCheckResult, BudgetCheckDetail, InputLatencyReport, InputLatencyCollector).

Also tests behavioral invariants: percentile monotonicity, collector capacity
limits, budget evaluation correctness, report generation, and display traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
